content.problemStatement:
Given an array of NNN numbers, write a program to check if a given number xxx exists in the array.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain two space separated numbers NNN and xxx - the length of array and the element to be searched.
The second line of input contains NNN space separated numbers - the elements of the array.


Output Format

Output on a single line, `YES` if xxx is present in the array, else `NO`.
constraints: All array elements and xxx are positive integer ≤100000 \leq 100000≤100000

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
7 is present in the given array {3, 4, 9, 1, 7, 2}
